steps.title: Find the hourly rate
steps.content: The rate is dollars per hour: $$\text{rate} = \frac{p}{w}$$ dollars per hour.

steps.title: Calculate earnings for 42w hours
steps.content: For $42w$ hours, multiply the rate by the time: $$\frac{p}{w} \times 42w = 42p$$ dollars. The $w$ cancels, leaving pay in dollars. A is correct.
